description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages build, test, upload, and release using the registry.gitlab.com/smc/dockerfiles:font-builder image by default. In the build stage add a build-branch job (except tags) that runs apt-get update -y, installs make and python3-pip, pip3 installs -r requirements.txt, then executes make otf ttf webfonts and stores the build/ directory as an artifact; also add a build-tag job (only tags) that installs make, python3-pip, and zip, runs pip3 install -r requirements.txt, then runs make ttf otf webfonts followed by sh tools/artifacts.sh, also archiving build/. In the test stage add a test job that installs make, libharfbuzz-bin, python3-pip, runs pip3 install -r requirements.txt and then make test. In the release stage add a release job using the release-cli image that defines a release with assets linking ${MANJARI_ZIP}, ${MANJARI_ZIP_MD5}, and ${MANJARI_ZIP_SHA} from the package registry URL, sets description and tag name from $CI_COMMIT_TAG, and runs echo "Running release_job"; also add a trigger_job that runs only on tags, depends on release, and triggers the project smc/smc.org.in. In the upload stage add an upload job (curlimages/curl:latest) that runs only on tags, depends on build-tag, and uploads build/${MANJARI_ZIP}, build/${MANJARI_ZIP_MD5}, and build/${MANJARI_ZIP_SHA} to the package registry using curl with the JOB-TOKEN header. Define variables MANJARI_ZIP, MANJARI_ZIP_MD5, MANJARI_ZIP_SHA, PACKAGE_REGISTRY_URL, and PACKAGE_VERSION based on the commit tag.
